channel.title: Teaching Information on Joseph Starr
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching Information on Joseph Starr

item.title: MATH:1350 Quantitative Reasoning for Business
item.description: Summary Algebraic techniques and modeling; quantitative methods for treating problems that arise in management and economic sciences; topics include algebra techniques, functions and functional models, exponential and logarithmic functions and models, and a thorough introduction to differential calculus; examples and applications from management, economic sciences, and related areas; for students planning to major in business. Taught from Lial, Hungerford, Holcomb, & Mullins: Mathematics with Applications in the Management, Natural, and Social Sciences, 12th Edition.
